title: Memory Blocks
story: [Meridian-7 Log #015] rEx's data stream contains string blocks surrounded by quotation marks — these are "memory blocks" in rEx's language. But escaped quotes may be nested inside the quotes. You must extract each memory block completely, without omission or truncation. This is the last key to understanding rEx's syntax.
promptChallenge: [Target] Double-quoted strings, including ones with \" escapes inside.
hints: [Hint] Strings start and end with double quotes
[Hint] The middle can contain escape characters \\ or \"
promptHints: Describe the string's delimiters and escape rules
Tell the AI it needs to handle escaped characters inside quotes
Hint the AI to use [^\\\"] or alternation for the content

feedback.onPass: [Syntax Awakening] Chapter Three complete. String capture mastered.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] String capture failed. Escape handling is the core of this challenge.
feedback.onPerfect: [Syntax Awakening] You can now read rEx's complete sentences. It's time to start the conversation.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual capture. Chapter Three — Syntax Awakening complete.
